mapper.select:
select ndgl.*, ndg.*, ds.*, da.*, grand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id 'grand_nx_distributer_father_goods_id', grand.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id 'grand_nx_dfg_fathers_father_id', grand.nx_dfg_father_goods_name 'grand_nx_dfg_father_goods_name', grand.nx_dfg_nx_goods_id 'grand_nx_dfg_nx_goods_id', grand.nx_dfg_father_goods_img 'grand_nx_dfg_father_goods_img', grand.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort 'grand_nx_dfg_father_goods_sort', greatGrand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id 'greatGrand_nx_dfg_distributer_father_goods_id', greatGrand.nx_dfg_distributer_id 'greatGrand_nx_dfg_distributer_id', greatGrand.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id 'greatGrand_nx_dfg_fathers_father_id', greatGrand.nx_dfg_father_goods_name 'greatGrand_nx_dfg_father_goods_name', greatGrand.nx_dfg_nx_goods_id 'greatGrand_nx_dfg_nx_goods_id', greatGrand.nx_dfg_father_goods_color 'greatGrand_nx_dfg_father_goods_color' from nx_distributer_goods_linshi as ndgl left join nx_distributer_goods as ndg on ndg.nx_distributer_goods_id = ndgl.nx_dg_to_nx_dis_goods_id left join nx_distributer_standard as ds on ds.nx_DS_dis_goods_id = ndg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_alias as da on da.nx_DA_dis_goods_id = ndg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_father_goods as grand on grand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = ndg.nx_dg_dfg_goods_grand_id left join nx_distributer_father_goods as greatGrand on greatGrand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = grand.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id where ndgl.nx_dg_distributer_ls_id = #{disId} and ndgl.nx_dg_goods_ls_status = -1 order by ndgl.nx_dg_apply_date desc, ndgl.nx_distributer_goods_ls_id desc
limit #{offset}, #{limit}
select count(*) from nx_distributer_goods_linshi as ndgl where ndgl.nx_dg_distributer_ls_id = #{disId} and ndgl.nx_dg_goods_ls_status = -1
select * from nx_distributer_goods_linshi where nx_dg_to_nx_dis_goods_id = #{value} limit 1

select ndgl.*, ndg.*, grand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id 'grand_nx_distributer_father_goods_id', grand.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id 'grand_nx_dfg_fathers_father_id', grand.nx_dfg_father_goods_name 'grand_nx_dfg_father_goods_name', grand.nx_dfg_nx_goods_id 'grand_nx_dfg_nx_goods_id', grand.nx_dfg_father_goods_img 'grand_nx_dfg_father_goods_img', grand.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort 'grand_nx_dfg_father_goods_sort', greatGrand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id 'greatGrand_nx_dfg_distributer_father_goods_id', greatGrand.nx_dfg_distributer_id 'greatGrand_nx_dfg_distributer_id', greatGrand.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id 'greatGrand_nx_dfg_fathers_father_id', greatGrand.nx_dfg_father_goods_name 'greatGrand_nx_dfg_father_goods_name', greatGrand.nx_dfg_nx_goods_id 'greatGrand_nx_dfg_nx_goods_id', greatGrand.nx_dfg_father_goods_color 'greatGrand_nx_dfg_father_goods_color', ndo.*, ds.nx_department_id 'nx_department_id', ds.nx_department_name 'nx_department_name', ds.nx_department_attr_name 'nx_department_attr_name', ds.nx_department_type 'nx_department_type', ds.nx_department_father_id 'nx_department_father_id', ds.nx_department_is_group_dep 'nx_department_is_group_dep', df.nx_department_id 'dd_nx_department_id', df.nx_department_name 'dd_nx_department_name', df.nx_department_attr_name 'dd_nx_department_attr_name', gds.gb_department_name 'gb_department_name', gds.gb_department_attr_name 'gb_department_attr_name', gds.gb_department_type 'gb_department_type', gds.gb_department_father_id 'gb_department_father_id', gds.gb_department_is_group_dep 'gb_department_is_group_dep', gdf.gb_department_id 'dd_gb_department_id', gdf.gb_department_name 'dd_gb_department_name', gdf.gb_department_attr_name 'dd_gb_department_attr_name' from nx_distributer_goods_linshi as ndgl left join nx_distributer_goods as ndg on ndg.nx_distributer_goods_id = ndgl.nx_dg_from_nx_dis_goods_id left join nx_distributer_father_goods as grand on grand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = ndg.nx_dg_dfg_goods_grand_id left join nx_distributer_father_goods as greatGrand on greatGrand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = grand.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id left join nx_department_order_history as ndo on ndo.nx_DO_dis_goods_id = COALESCE(ndgl.nx_dg_to_nx_dis_goods_id, ndgl.nx_dg_from_nx_dis_goods_id) and ndo.nx_DO_distributer_id = #{disId} left join nx_department as ds on ds.nx_department_id = ndo.nx_DO_department_id left join nx_department as df on df.nx_department_id = ds.nx_department_father_id left join gb_department as gds on gds.gb_department_id = ndo.nx_DO_gb_department_id left join gb_department as gdf on gdf.gb_department_id = gds.gb_department_father_id where ndgl.nx_dg_distributer_ls_id = #{disId} and ndgl.nx_dg_goods_ls_status = #{status} order by ndgl.nx_dg_apply_date desc, ndgl.nx_distributer_goods_ls_id desc
select nx_dg_from_nx_dis_goods_id from nx_distributer_goods_linshi where nx_dg_distributer_ls_id = #{disId} and nx_dg_from_nx_dis_goods_id is not null and nx_dg_goods_ls_status in (1, 2)
mapper.delete:
delete from nx_distributer_goods_linshi where nx_distributer_goods_ls_id in
#{nxDistributerGoodsLsId}
